name: Modern Resume
description: Clean, professional resume template with modern formatting

variables.label: Professional Summary
variables.placeholder: Brief overview of your professional background and key strengths...
variables.hint: 2-4 sentences highlighting your experience and value proposition

variables.label: Work Experience
variables.placeholder:
Job Title - Company Name
Dates
• Key achievement or responsibility
• Key achievement or responsibility

Job Title - Company Name...
variables.hint: Start with most recent position. Use bullet points for achievements.

variables.label: Education
variables.placeholder:
Degree - University Name
Graduation Year
• Honors or relevant details

Degree - University Name...

variables.label: Skills
variables.placeholder:
Technical: Python, JavaScript, SQL, AWS
Soft Skills: Leadership, Communication, Problem-solving
variables.hint: Separate skills with commas or list by category

variables.label: Certifications
variables.placeholder:
AWS Certified Solutions Architect - 2023
PMP Certification - 2022
